The '''Slagilith''' is an enemy encountered during the [[One Small Favour]] quest, inside the [[Goblin Cave]]. It is summoned when attempting to free [[Petra Fiyed]] from the rock face; the player fails to properly cast the spell contained within their [[animate rock scroll|scroll]], thus accidentally animating some rocks nearby.

The Slagilith attacks within melee range and can hit up to 13 damage, so [[Protect from Melee]] is advised, although it is quite inaccurate. In addition, it has fairly high melee defence bonuses and will reduce your damage by 67% if a pickaxe is not '''equipped'''. {{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1219652159148646401|date=21 January 2019|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/107496|archivedate=28 May 2020|quote=[The Slagilith] just reduces the damage to 33% if the attacker isn't wielding a pickaxe.}} [[Combat spells]] will deal full damage as to Slagilith as long as a pickaxe is equipped, and Slagilith additionally has lower Magic defence. The damage reduction may also be circumvented for [[Ranged]] by unequipping your weapon after firing and equipping the pickaxe before your attack hits, though Slagilith has higher Ranged defence.

[[Rings of recoil]] are effective in speeding up the kill for low levels; a [[pickaxe]] must be equipped for this to work. The two rock piles nearby can be used as safespots for [[Magic|mage attacks]], [[Ranged|ranging]] or [[flinching]], by trapping Slagilith off melee range. Equipping a pickaxe before ranged or magic attacks hit will allow them to do full damage. 

The Slagilith will disappear within 5 minutes after it is summoned.

High-levelled players should not have any problem dispatching this monster by using their highest level [[pickaxe]] and gear.

When defeated during the quest, it will drop an [[adamantite ore]], an [[uncut diamond]] and an [[uncut ruby]]. It cannot be defeated again after the quest outside of the [[Nightmare Zone]], where it will not drop anything.[[File:Slagilith battle.png|thumb|left|Hacking away at the slagilith.]]

==Trivia==
*The name seems to be a portmanteau of "''{{WP|Slag}}''", a byproduct after removing the desired mineral from ore, and the suffix ''"-lith"'' from ''"lithos"'' meaning stone in Greek.
*The word Slagilith was censored in chat, because "slag" is also a derogatory term for a woman who sleeps around.
*An [[Update:Quest Speedrunning: Batch 3 & More|update]] temporarily left Slagilith unable to despawn straight away upon leaving the cave, due to an off-by-one error in an optimisation for caching server-side game scripts.{{CiteReddit|author=Mod Nin|url=https://www.reddit.com/r/2007scape/comments/zez1hj/the_update_broke_the_ladder_in_mlm_lmao/jkyrdv2/?context=3|title=The update broke the ladder in MLM lmao|quote=An optimisation to how server-side game scripts are cached had an off-by-one error (a < rather than <=). It broke two scripts: one related to this ladder, and one that we don't think anyone would ever find, notice, or have any impact before next week's update. [Is it safe to say what the other ladder was now?] Hah sure! It wasn't a ladder - it was a script that despawns the Slagalith when you leave the boss area (but the boss despawns on its own after a while anyway).|date=20 May 2023|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/108359|archivedate=30 June 2023}}
